should_trigger: Use game theory to decide whether we should cut price, bundle channels, differentiate upward, or hold price, and forecast how the head competitor and channels may react.
Build a CEO report for this financing negotiation with players, strategies, payoffs, bargaining leverage, credible commitments, and update triggers.
A competitor just launched a free version; update our previous game theory report and export Markdown, HTML, Word, and PDF.
Choose the right game theory frameworks for this platform ecosystem case, combine Nash equilibrium, coordination, signaling, and repeated-game lenses, then produce an application report.
should_not_trigger: Explain Nash equilibrium to a beginner.
Solve this textbook payoff matrix homework problem.
Give me legal advice on whether this competitor behavior violates antitrust law.
near_neighbor: Brainstorm growth strategy without modeling any competitor or partner reaction.
Create a Bayesian decision report with priors and posterior probabilities.
Write a generic market research summary with no strategic move to choose.
